name: Shredded Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 4 oz can mushroom stems and pieces
recipeInstructions:
1 Brown Swiss steak on both sides in a large Dutch oven.
2 Add 1 can of stewed tomatoes, mushrooms, garlic, and bay leaves.
3 Add enough water to cover the top of the meat.
4 Cover and simmer for 3 to 4 hours.
5 When most of the liquid is gone, remove meat from the pan and let cool for a few minutes (long enough to be touched without getting burned).
6 Shred the meat with a fork and return it to the pan.
7 Add the other can of tomatoes, cumin, and salsa if desired.
8 Simmer until all juice is gone.
9 Use as desired for tacos, burritos or any dish you prefer.
